faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Tottenville typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms or floors require treatment. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat a flea infestation in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout Tottenville and Staten Island. Most treatments take 1-2 hours to complete, and you'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatment products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, and we'll provide specific instructions based on the products used in your Tottenville home.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your flea treatment services in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our flea treatment services with a satisfaction guarantee. If fleas return within our warranty period, we'll re-treat your Tottenville home at no additional charge. We also offer preventative maintenance plans to keep your home flea-free year-round.
